{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Red gnomes
| aliases = red gnomes
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[City of Light (novel)|City of Light]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Red]] gnomes are small, bearded creatures characterized by their distinctive bright red caps. Originating from the [[Red District]] of [[Elysia]], they are known for an extreme level of diligence and work ethic, often refusing to abandon a task until it is fully completed or they perish from fatigue. This intense dedication can make them difficult to manage, as they may prioritize their duties over the needs of others. They serve various roles, acting as overseers for employees, laborers, and even as combat support for soldiers during battles. Despite being physically small—approximately two feet in height—and appearing somewhat unusual to others, they are highly disciplined and focused on their labor.}}

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Red gnomes]] circle the crumbling building.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15">''City of Light'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Red gnomes]] from [[Elysia]] are supporting a group of soldiers.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
